title.en: China-to-Czechia Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入捷克：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入捷克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Czechia (ÚNMZ/ERÚ/ČEPS) expectations: ÚNMZ/ČAS-adopted standards routes, ERÚ and ČEPS grid-connection processes, CE-marking-aligned requirements, IEC 62109, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 evidence, with 230/400 V 50 Hz grid settings — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与捷克（ÚNMZ/ERÚ/ČEPS）要求的对照，包括ÚNMZ/ČAS采用路径、ERÚ/ČEPS并网审查、EU CE一致性证据、IEC 62109、IEC 62116、防孤岛和IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据；并考虑230/400 V、50 Hz电网，与中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准比较。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與捷克（ÚNMZ/ERÚ/ČEPS）要求的對照，包括ÚNMZ/ČAS採用路徑、ERÚ/ČEPS併網審查、EU CE一致性證據、IEC 62109、IEC 62116、防孤島和IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據；並考慮230/400 V、50 Hz電網，與中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準比較。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, standards determination, grid-operator approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Czechia (ÚNMZ/ERÚ/ČEPS) requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、标准裁定、并网审批、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行捷克（ÚNMZ/ERÚ/ČEPS）要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、標準裁定、併網核准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行捷克（ÚNMZ/ERÚ/ČEPS）要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Czechia, practical gaps are: confirm the applicable ÚNMZ/ČAS route and project-level approval path; validate that IEC 62109-1/-2 safety testing, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, and IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC documentation are accepted for Czechia installations; and prove 230/400 V 50 Hz performance, protection thresholds, and reconnection timing for ERÚ/ČEPS-connected projects. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 documents are useful but not automatically interchangeable with Czechia evidence. Czech-language documentation is often required by local project owners and installers.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口捷克时，主要差距包括：确认ÚNMZ/ČAS适用路径与项目级审批，核实IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727并网接口和IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC证据是否被捷克项目接受，并验证230/400 V 50 Hz下的保护阈值和重连延迟；中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004与GB/T 19964证据不能自动替代捷克证据。当地项目业主和安装商通常要求提供捷克语文件。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口捷克時，主要差距包括：確認ÚNMZ/ČAS適用路徑與專案級審核，核實IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727並網介面和IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC證據是否被捷克專案接受，並驗證230/400 V 50 Hz下的保護閾值和重連延遲；中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004與GB/T 19964證據不能自動替代捷克證據。當地專案業主和安裝商通常要求提供捷克語文件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
